evidences.title: Athletic Club 3-1 Qarabag FK - Champions League 2025/2026 ...
evidences.content: In midfield, Iñigo Ruiz de Galarreta and Mikel Jauregizar are set to anchor the side, offering balance behind a creative trio of Nico Williams, Robert Navarro, and Iñaki Williams — though the elder Williams remains doubtful through injury. That could push Valverde to redeploy Gorka Guruzeta, who scored Athletic’s only goal of the group stage so far, as a false nine or wide forward. Oihan Sancet and Mikel Vesga are both sidelined, depriving Athletic of their usual midfield control and physical presence. [...] Ernesto Valverde is expected to remain loyal to his 4-2-3-1 system, though injuries have limited his options. Unai Simón starts in goal despite a difficult European campaign, conceding six goals from just 3.2 expected goals on target — the worst differential among Champions League goalkeepers across the first two matchdays. The back four should feature Areso, Vivian, Laporte, and Yuri Berchiche, with the latter’s experience vital in steadying a defence that has struggled for cohesion. evidences.title: Athletic Club vs. Qarabag: UCL betting odds, prediction, pick
evidences.content: # Athletic Club vs. Qarabag: Champions League betting odds, prediction, pick Athletic Club will host surprise package Qarabag on Wednesday in the UEFA Champions League group stage. The two sides enter the match on opposite ends of the table, with Athletic pointless after two matches and Qarabag boasting two wins from two. The home side is in dire need of a win after dropping its opening games against Arsenal and Borussia Dortmund. The match against Qarabag may have looked like an easy three points when it was first scheduled, but the Azerbaijani side has been hugely impressive early in the competition. Qarabag defeated Benfica 3-2 away, then returned home to earn a 2-0 victory over FC Copenhagen. [...] Our team of savvy editors independently handpicks all recommendations. evidences.title: Athletic Club 3-1 Qarabag FK - Champions League 2025/2026 ...
evidences.content: The tactical battle at San Mamés may hinge on tempo. Athletic will look to assert themselves through wide overloads and quick interchanges between Nico Williams and Navarro, seeking to stretch Qarabağ’s compact shape. Guruzeta’s movement between the lines could prove crucial in breaking Qurbanov’s disciplined mid-block. Conversely, the visitors will look to exploit transitions, with Andrade and Kashchuk’s pace on the counter and Zoubir’s creativity posing genuine threats on the break. [...] Statistically, Qarabağ have been one of the competition’s early revelations. Their five goals from two matches already surpass their entire output in their previous Champions League campaign (two in 2017–18). None of their last 44 UEFA matches have ended goalless, and they have scored 15 times across their last five Champions League fixtures — evidence of a side unafraid to play with adventure. [...] Qarabağ, by contrast, arrive in Bilbao full of conviction. Under Qurban Qurbanov, now in his 16th season in charge, the Azerbaijani champions have evolved from defensive survivors into a side capable of dictating rhythm through possession and pressing. Their victories over Benfica (3-2) and Copen...

evidences.title: Athletic Bilbao vs Qarabag FK - prediction, team news, lineups
evidences.content: © Imago Athletic will again be without the services of Yeray Alvarez through suspension, while Benat Prados and Unai Egiluz are out of the Champions League fixture on Wednesday night. A late check needs to be made on Inaki Williams, who has a muscular issue, but the experienced attacker is expected to be available to start, while his brother Nico Williams will also be in the XI. There are not expected to be any major surprises in the Athletic team on Wednesday, with Oihan Sancet and Gorka Guruzeta also set to feature in the final third of the field. As for Qarabag, no injury problems have been reported, so the visitors could have a full squad for this contest, and they have a number of players in excellent form. [...] Abdellah Zoubir has scored four goals and registered four assists in all competitions this season, and the 33-year-old will be among the starters for Qarabag against Athletic. Leandro Andrade has four goals and three assists this term and will also be in the XI, while Kady Borges and Camilo Duran are also set to feature from the first whistle in the European fixture. evidences.title: Athletic Club - Qarabağ FK | UEFA Champions League | 10/22/2025
evidences.content: From that moment onwards, Valverde's Lions composed themselves and put their foot on the gas. Oihan Sancet sent a shot over the bar after being played through by Alejandro Rego, and shortly afterwards, the attacking midfielder set up Guruzeta in front of goal. Kochalski's save with his right leg foreshadowed trouble, but Gorka appeared time and time again to be decisive. Rightfully earning his man-of-the-match award. Nico Williams, Guru and Sancet came close to scoring again. To make matters worse, Iñaki Williams went off injured in the 35th minute. Four minutes later, Mikel Jauregizar split the Azerbaijani defence with a pass to Guruzeta. This time, the striker made no mistake. San Mamés went wild. [...] There were two further chances for Sancet and a potential penalty for Nico Williams before half-time arrived. Athletic continued in the same vein after the break. The omnipresent Guruzeta had another opportunity and Aitor Paredes failed to score from close range. The team was running out of steam and Valverde made a decisive triple substitution. After some magnificent passing, Robert Navarro conjured up a superb goal, curling a stunner into the top corner. Pure quality. Navarro...

In 1969, the team withdrew from the league due to poor financial management. In 1977, they were renamed Shafaq. From 1982 to 1987, they were called 'Kooperator' (Co-operative Society). In 1987, the club changed names to Qarabag Futbol Klubu and became a founding member of the Azerbaijan Premier League in 1992. evidences.content: ### Related rivals qarabag-fk Opponent Qarabağ FK More ### Related match ### Athletic Club- Qarabağ FK Matchday 3 | Season 2025-26 22/10/202518:45San Mamés VS Athletic Club Qarabağ FK View details [...] ## Match Info San Mames, Bilbao UEFA Champions League, League Phase MD3 Wednesday October 22, 18:45 CEST Tickets can be purchased via this link. . In 1987, the club changed names to Qarabag Futbol Klubu and became a founding member of the Azerbaijan Premier League in 1992. Nicknamed Atlılar (The Horsemen), Göy-ağlar (Blue and Whites) or Qaçqın Klub (Refugee Club), Qarabag are the only major Azerbaijani side to represent the war-torn Nagorno-Karabakh region. The club enjoys strong support from the former population of Aghdam, as well as from some 500,000 internally displaced Azerbaijanis from the Karabakh area. What's more, due to recent successes, they now have a broad fan base throughout the country. [...] Although they originally played at the Imarat Stadium, Qarabag have been based in the Azerbaijani capital, Baku, since the first Nagorno-Karabakh War in 1993.
